The first year of the fifth lustrum presided over by Tvasta is
Sarvajit. The others are SarvadhQrin, Virodhin, Vikrta and khara.
Of these only the second year viz. Sarvadharin, is beneficial, and
the rest lead to danger.
In the sixth lustrum presided over by Ahirbudhnya the years
are named Nandana, Vijaya, jaya, Manmatha and Durmukha. Of these
the first three years are beneficial, while Manmatha, the 4th year,
is middling, but the last one is utterly baneful.
